@haklex/rich-editor-ui/src/components/dropdown-menu/index.tsx 调整这个 Dropdown 整体的样式 ，复刻：参考这个样式："use client"

import * as React from "react"
import { Menu as MenuPrimitive } from "@base-ui/react/menu"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { ChevronRightIcon, CheckIcon } from "lucide-react"

function DropdownMenu({ ...props }: MenuPrimitive.Root.Props) {
  return <MenuPrimitive.Root data-slot="dropdown-menu" {...props} />
}

function DropdownMenuPortal({ ...props }: MenuPrimitive.Portal.Props) {
  return <MenuPrimitive.Portal data-slot="dropdown-menu-portal" {...props} />
}

function DropdownMenuTrigger({ ...props }: MenuPrimitive.Trigger.Props) {
  return <MenuPrimitive.Trigger data-slot="dropdown-menu-trigger" {...props} />
}

function DropdownMenuContent({
  align = "start",
  alignOffset = 0,
  side = "bottom",
  sideOffset = 4,
  className,
  ...props
}: MenuPrimitive.Popup.Props &
  Pick<
    MenuPrimitive.Positioner.Props,
    "align" | "alignOffset" | "side" | "sideOffset"
  >) {
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.Portal>
      <MenuPrimitive.Positioner
        className="isolate z-50 outline-none"
        align={align}
        alignOffset={alignOffset}
        side={side}
        sideOffset={sideOffset}
      >
        <MenuPrimitive.Popup
          data-slot="dropdown-menu-content"
          className={cn("data-open:animate-in data-closed:animate-out data-closed:fade-out-0 data-open:fade-in-0 data-closed:zoom-out-95 data-open:zoom-in-95 data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2 ring-foreground/10 bg-popover text-popover-foreground min-w-32 rounded-lg p-1 shadow-md ring-1 duration-100 data-[side=inline-start]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=inline-end]:slide-in-from-left-2 z-50 max-h-(--available-height) w-(--anchor-width) origin-(--transform-origin) overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto outline-none data-closed:overflow-hidden", className )}
          {...props}
        />
      </MenuPrimitive.Positioner>
    </MenuPrimitive.Portal>
  )
}

function DropdownMenuGroup({ ...props }: MenuPrimitive.Group.Props) {
  return <MenuPrimitive.Group data-slot="dropdown-menu-group" {...props} />
}

function DropdownMenuLabel({
  className,
  inset,
  ...props
}: MenuPrimitive.GroupLabel.Props & {
  inset?: boolean
}) {
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.GroupLabel
      data-slot="dropdown-menu-label"
      data-inset={inset}
      className={cn("text-muted-foreground px-1.5 py-1 text-xs font-medium data-inset:pl-7", className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function DropdownMenuItem({
  className,
  inset,
  variant = "default",
  ...props
}: MenuPrimitive.Item.Props & {
  inset?: boolean
  variant?: "default" | "destructive"
}) {
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.Item
      data-slot="dropdown-menu-item"
      data-inset={inset}
      data-variant={variant}
      className={cn(
        "focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground data-[variant=destructive]:text-destructive data-[variant=destructive]:focus:bg-destructive/10 dark:data-[variant=destructive]:focus:bg-destructive/20 data-[variant=destructive]:focus:text-destructive data-[variant=destructive]:*:[svg]:text-destructive not-data-[variant=destructive]:focus:**:text-accent-foreground gap-1.5 rounded-md px-1.5 py-1 text-sm data-inset:pl-7 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 group/dropdown-menu-item relative flex cursor-default items-center outline-hidden select-none data-disabled:pointer-events-none data-disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function DropdownMenuSub({ ...props }: MenuPrimitive.SubmenuRoot.Props) {
  return <MenuPrimitive.SubmenuRoot data-slot="dropdown-menu-sub" {...props} />
}

function DropdownMenuSubTrigger({
  className,
  inset,
  children,
  ...props
}: MenuPrimitive.SubmenuTrigger.Props & {
  inset?: boolean
}) {
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.SubmenuTrigger
      data-slot="dropdown-menu-sub-trigger"
      data-inset={inset}
      className={cn(
        "focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground data-open:bg-accent data-open:text-accent-foreground not-data-[variant=destructive]:focus:**:text-accent-foreground gap-1.5 rounded-md px-1.5 py-1 text-sm data-inset:pl-7 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 flex cursor-default items-center outline-hidden select-none data-popup-open:bg-accent data-popup-open:text-accent-foreground [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    >
      {children}
      <ChevronRightIcon className="cn-rtl-flip ml-auto" />
    </MenuPrimitive.SubmenuTrigger>
  )
}

function DropdownMenuSubContent({
  align = "start",
  alignOffset = -3,
  side = "right",
  sideOffset = 0,
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof DropdownMenuContent>) {
  return (
    <DropdownMenuContent
      data-slot="dropdown-menu-sub-content"
      className={cn("data-open:animate-in data-closed:animate-out data-closed:fade-out-0 data-open:fade-in-0 data-closed:zoom-out-95 data-open:zoom-in-95 data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2 ring-foreground/10 bg-popover text-popover-foreground min-w-[96px] rounded-lg p-1 shadow-lg ring-1 duration-100 w-auto", className)}
      align={align}
      alignOffset={alignOffset}
      side={side}
      sideOffset={sideOffset}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function DropdownMenuCheckboxItem({
  className,
  children,
  checked,
  inset,
  ...props
}: MenuPrimitive.CheckboxItem.Props & {
  inset?: boolean
}) {
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.CheckboxItem
      data-slot="dropdown-menu-checkbox-item"
      data-inset={inset}
      className={cn(
        "focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground focus:**:text-accent-foreground gap-1.5 rounded-md py-1 pr-8 pl-1.5 text-sm data-inset:pl-7 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 relative flex cursor-default items-center outline-hidden select-none data-disabled:pointer-events-none data-disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
        className
      )}
      checked={checked}
      {...props}
    >
      <span
        className="absolute right-2 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none"
        data-slot="dropdown-menu-checkbox-item-indicator"
      >
        <MenuPrimitive.CheckboxItemIndicator>
          <CheckIcon
          />
        </MenuPrimitive.CheckboxItemIndicator>
      </span>
      {children}
    </MenuPrimitive.CheckboxItem>
  )
}

function DropdownMenuRadioGroup({ ...props }: MenuPrimitive.RadioGroup.Props) {
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.RadioGroup
      data-slot="dropdown-menu-radio-group"
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function DropdownMenuRadioItem({
  className,
  children,
  inset,
  ...props
}: MenuPrimitive.RadioItem.Props & {
  inset?: boolean
}) {
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.RadioItem
      data-slot="dropdown-menu-radio-item"
      data-inset={inset}
      className={cn(
        "focus:bg-accent focus:text-accent-foreground focus:**:text-accent-foreground gap-1.5 rounded-md py-1 pr-8 pl-1.5 text-sm data-inset:pl-7 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 relative flex cursor-default items-center outline-hidden select-none data-disabled:pointer-events-none data-disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    >
      <span
        className="absolute right-2 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none"
        data-slot="dropdown-menu-radio-item-indicator"
      >
        <MenuPrimitive.RadioItemIndicator>
          <CheckIcon
          />
        </MenuPrimitive.RadioItemIndicator>
      </span>
      {children}
    </MenuPrimitive.RadioItem>
  )
}

function DropdownMenuSeparator({
  className,
  ...props
}: MenuPrimitive.Separator.Props) {
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.Separator
      data-slot="dropdown-menu-separator"
      className={cn("bg-border -mx-1 my-1 h-px", className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function DropdownMenuShortcut({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<"span">) {
  return (
    <span
      data-slot="dropdown-menu-shortcut"
      className={cn("text-muted-foreground group-focus/dropdown-menu-item:text-accent-foreground ml-auto text-xs tracking-widest", className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuPortal,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuGroup,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuCheckboxItem,
  DropdownMenuRadioGroup,
  DropdownMenuRadioItem,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuShortcut,
  DropdownMenuSub,
  DropdownMenuSubTrigger,
  DropdownMenuSubContent,
}

```text
   106→    fontSizeSmall: 'rc-font-size-small',
   107→    /** 默认值: '1.7' */
   108→    lineHeight: 'rc-line-height',
   109→    /** 默认值: '1.4' */
   110→    lineHeightTight: 'rc-line-height-tight',
   111→  },
   112→  borderRadius: {
   113→    /** 默认值: '4px' */
   114→    sm: 'rc-radius-sm',
   115→    /** 默认值: '8px' */
   116→    md: 'rc-radius-md',
   117→    /** 默认值: '12px' */
   118→    lg: 'rc-radius-lg',
   119→  },
   120→  layout: {
   121→    /** 默认值: '700px' */
   122→    maxWidth: 'rc-max-width',
   123→  },
   124→  boxShadow: {
   125→    /** 默认值: '0 8px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)' */
   126→    topBar: 'rc-shadow-top-bar',
   127→    /** 默认值: '0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)' */
   128→    modal: 'rc-shadow-modal',
   129→    /** 默认值: '0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' */
   130→    menu: 'rc-shadow-menu',
   131→  },
   132→})
   133→
   134→// :root default (light article)
   135→createGlobalTheme(':root', vars, {
   136→  color: lightArticleColors,
   137→  ...articleLayout,
   138→})
   139→
   140→// :root dark fallback (for elements without a variant theme class)
   141→createGlobalTheme(':root.dark', vars, {
   142→  color: darkColors,
   143→  ...articleLayout,
   144→  boxShadow: darkBoxShadow,
   145→})
   146→
   147→// Three variant theme classes (light colors only; dark handled by CSS override)
   148→export const articleTheme = createTheme(vars, {
   149→  color: lightArticleColors,
   150→  ...articleLayout,
   151→})
   152→
   153→export const noteTheme = createTheme(vars, {
   154→  color: lightArticleColors,
   155→  ...noteLayout,
   156→})
   157→
   158→export const commentTheme = createTheme(vars, {
   159→  color: lightCommentColors,
   160→  ...commentLayout,
   161→})
   162→
   163→// Dark override: ancestor .dark or [data-theme="dark"] overrides color and shadow vars
   164→const darkColorOverrides = assignVars(vars.color, darkColors)
   165→const darkShadowOverrides = assignVars(vars.boxShadow, darkBoxShadow)
   166→
   167→for (const themeClass of [articleTheme, noteTheme, commentTheme]) {
   168→  globalStyle(`.dark .${themeClass}, [data-theme="dark"] .${themeClass}`, {
   169→    vars: { ...darkColorOverrides, ...darkShadowOverrides },
   170→  })
   171→  // Also handle when the theme class is on the element itself (not a descendant)
   172→  globalStyle(`.dark.${themeClass}, [data-theme="dark"].${themeClass}`, {
   173→    vars: { ...darkColorOverrides, ...darkShadowOverrides },
   174→  })
   175→}
   176→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```typescript
import { vars } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import { globalStyle, keyframes, style } from '@vanilla-extract/css'

const popupIn = keyframes({
  from: {
    opacity: 0,
    transform: 'scale(0.95)',
  },
  to: {
    opacity: 1,
    transform: 'scale(1)',
  },
})

const popupOut = keyframes({
  from: {
    opacity: 1,
    transform: 'scale(1)',
  },
  to: {
    opacity: 0,
    transform: 'scale(0.95)',
  },
})

export const popup = style({
  minWidth: '8rem',
  maxWidth: 'min(20rem, calc(100vw - 0.75rem))',
  borderRadius: vars.borderRadius.lg,
  padding: '0.25rem',
  backgroundColor: vars.color.bg,
  boxShadow: `0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, ${vars.color.text} 10%, transparent), ${vars.boxShadow.menu}`,
  outline: 'none',
  color: vars.color.text,
  fontFamily: vars.typography.fontFamilySans,
  fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeSmall,
  zIndex: 50,
  maxHeight: 'var(--available-height)',
  overflowX: 'hidden',
  overflowY: 'auto',
  transformOrigin: 'var(--transform-origin)',
  transition: 'opacity 100ms ease-out, transform 100ms ease-out',
  selectors: {
    '&[data-open]': {
      animation: `${popupIn} 100ms ease-out`,
    },
    '&[data-starting-style]': {
      opacity: 0,
      transform: 'scale(0.95)',
    },
    '&[data-ending-style]': {
      opacity: 0,
      transform: 'scale(0.95)',
    },
    '&[data-closed]': {
      animation: `${popupOut} 100ms ease-in`,
      overflow: 'hidden',
    },
  },
})

export const positioner = style({
  outline: 'none',
  zIndex: 50,
  isolation: 'isolate',
  selectors: {
    '&[data-side="bottom"]': {
      transform: 'translateY(2px)',
    },
    '&[data-side="top"]': {
      transform: 'translateY(-2px)',
    },
    '&[data-side="left"]': {
      transform: 'translateX(-2px)',
    },
    '&[data-side="right"]': {
      transform: 'translateX(2px)',
    },
  },
})

export const item = style({
  display: 'flex',
  alignItems: 'center',
  gap: '0.375rem',
  borderRadius: vars.borderRadius.md,
  padding: '0.25rem 0.375rem',
  fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeSmall,
  lineHeight: 1.35,
  outline: 'none',
  userSelect: 'none',
  cursor: 'default',
  color: vars.color.text,
  position: 'relative',
  transition: 'background-color 100ms ease, color 100ms ease',
  selectors: {
    '&[data-highlighted]': {
      backgroundColor: vars.color.fillSecondary,
      color: vars.color.text,
    },
    '&[data-disabled]': {
      opacity: 0.5,
      pointerEvents: 'none',
    },
  },
})

globalStyle(`${item} svg`, {
  pointerEvents: 'none',
  flexShrink: 0,
  width: '1rem',
  height: '1rem',
  color: vars.color.textSecondary,
  transition: 'color 100ms ease',
})

globalStyle(`${item}[data-highlighted] svg`, {
  color: vars.color.text,
})

export const separator = style({
  height: '1px',
  backgroundColor: vars.color.hrBorder,
  margin: '0.25rem -0.25rem',
})

export const label = style({
  fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeXs,
  fontWeight: 500,
  lineHeight: 1.4,
  color: vars.color.textTertiary,
  padding: '0.25rem 0.375rem',
})

const itemWithIndicator = style({
  paddingRight: '2rem',
})

export const checkboxItem = itemWithIndicator
export const radioItem = itemWithIndicator

export const checkboxIndicator = style({
  position: 'absolute',
  right: '0.5rem',
  display: 'inline-flex',
  alignItems: 'center',
  justifyContent: 'center',
  width: '1rem',
  height: '1rem',
  flexShrink: 0,
  pointerEvents: 'none',
  color: vars.color.textSecondary,
})

export const radioIndicator = style({
  position: 'absolute',
  right: '0.5rem',
  display: 'inline-flex',
  alignItems: 'center',
  justifyContent: 'center',
  width: '1rem',
  height: '1rem',
  flexShrink: 0,
  pointerEvents: 'none',
  color: vars.color.textSecondary,
})

```

```text
   100→// ─── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────
   101→function getBlockElement(
   102→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   103→  target: HTMLElement,
   104→): HTMLElement | null {
   105→  const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
   106→  if (!rootElement) return null
   107→  let current: HTMLElement | null = target
   108→  while (current && current !== rootElement) {
   109→    if (current.parentElement === rootElement) return current
   110→    current = current.parentElement
   111→  }
   112→  return null
   113→}
   114→
   115→function getNearestBlockByY(
   116→  rootElement: HTMLElement,
   117→  clientY: number,
   118→): HTMLElement | null {
   119→  const blocks = Array.from(rootElement.children).filter(
   120→    (child): child is HTMLElement => child instanceof HTMLElement,
   121→  )
   122→  if (!blocks.length) return null
   123→
   124→  let nearestBlock: HTMLElement | null = null
   125→  let nearestDistance = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY
   126→
   127→  for (const block of blocks) {
   128→    const rect = block.getBoundingClientRect()
   129→    if (rect.height <= 0) continue
   130→    if (clientY >= rect.top && clientY <= rect.bottom) return block
   131→
   132→    const distance =
   133→      clientY < rect.top ? rect.top - clientY : clientY - rect.bottom
   134→    if (distance < nearestDistance) {
   135→      nearestDistance = distance
   136→      nearestBlock = block
   137→    }
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  return nearestBlock
   141→}
   142→
   143→function getDropTargetBlock(
   144→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   145→  rootElement: HTMLElement,
   146→  event: DragEvent,
   147→): HTMLElement | null {
   148→  const rootRect = rootElement.getBoundingClientRect()
   149→  if (rootRect.width <= 0 || rootRect.height <= 0) return null
   150→  if (event.clientY < rootRect.top || event.clientY > rootRect.bottom) {
   151→    return null
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  const points: Array<{ x: number; y: number }> = [
   155→    { x: event.clientX, y: event.clientY },
   156→  ]
   157→  const clampedX = Math.min(
   158→    rootRect.right - 1,
   159→    Math.max(rootRect.left + 1, event.clientX),
   160→  )
   161→  if (clampedX !== event.clientX) {
   162→    points.unshift({ x: clampedX, y: event.clientY })
   163→  }
   164→
   165→  for (const point of points) {
   166→    const element = document.elementFromPoint(point.x, point.y)
   167→    if (!(element instanceof HTMLElement)) continue
   168→    const block = getBlockElement(editor, element)
   169→    if (block) return block
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  const { target } = event
   173→  if (target instanceof HTMLElement) {
   174→    const block = getBlockElement(editor, target)
   175→    if (block) return block
   176→  }
   177→
   178→  return getNearestBlockByY(rootElement, event.clientY)
   179→}
   180→
   181→function toPagePosition(rect: DOMRect) {
   182→  return {
   183→    top: rect.top + window.scrollY,
   184→    left: rect.left + window.scrollX,
   185→  }
   186→}
   187→
   188→function $cloneNode(
   189→  node: import('lexical').LexicalNode,
   190→): import('lexical').LexicalNode {
   191→  const Klass = node.constructor as any
   192→  const serialized = node.exportJSON()
   193→  const clone = Klass.importJSON(serialized)
   194→  if ($isElementNode(node) && $isElementNode(clone)) {
   195→    for (const child of node.getChildren()) {
   196→      clone.append($cloneNode(child))
   197→    }
   198→  }
   199→  return clone
   200→}
   201→
   202→// ─── Inner Component ────────────────────────────────────
   203→function BlockHandleInner({
   204→  editor,
   205→}: {
   206→  editor: LexicalEditor
   207→}): ReactElement | null {
   208→  const [handle, setHandle] = useState<HandlePosition>({
   209→    visible: false,
   210→    top: 0,
   211→    left: 0,
   212→    nodeKey: null,
   213→  })
   214→  const [dropLine, setDropLine] = useState<DropLineState>({
   215→    visible: false,
   216→    top: 0,
   217→    left: 0,
   218→    width: 0,
   219→  })
   220→
   221→  const activeBlockRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null)
   222→  const hideTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null)
   223→  const hoveringHandleRef = useRef(false)
   224→  const menuOpenCountRef = useRef(0)
   225→  const dragPreviewRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null)
   226→  const draggingBlockRef = useRef<HTMLElement | null>(null)
   227→
   228→  // ── Hover visibility ──
   229→  const clearHideTimer = useCallback(() => {
   230→    if (hideTimerRef.current) {
   231→      clearTimeout(hideTimerRef.current)
   232→      hideTimerRef.current = null
   233→    }
   234→  }, [])
   235→
   236→  const scheduleHide = useCallback(() => {
   237→    clearHideTimer()
   238→    hideTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
   239→      if (!hoveringHandleRef.current && menuOpenCountRef.current === 0) {
   240→        activeBlockRef.current = null
   241→        setHandle((s) => ({ ...s, visible: false, nodeKey: null }))
   242→      }
   243→    }, HIDE_DELAY)
   244→  }, [clearHideTimer])
   245→
   246→  const onHandleEnter = useCallback(() => {
   247→    hoveringHandleRef.current = true
   248→    clearHideTimer()
   249→  }, [clearHideTimer])
   250→
   251→  const onHandleLeave = useCallback(() => {
   252→    hoveringHandleRef.current = false
   253→    scheduleHide()
   254→  }, [scheduleHide])
   255→
   256→  const onMenuOpenChange = useCallback(
   257→    (open: boolean) => {
   258→      menuOpenCountRef.current += open ? 1 : -1
   259→      if (!open) scheduleHide()
   260→      else clearHideTimer()
   261→    },
   262→    [scheduleHide, clearHideTimer],
   263→  )
   264→
   265→  // ── Position update from anchor ──
   266→  const updatePositionFromBlock = useCallback(
   267→    (block?: HTMLElement | null) => {
   268→      if (block !== undefined) activeBlockRef.current = block
   269→      const el = activeBlockRef.current
   270→      if (!el || !el.isConnected) {
   271→        activeBlockRef.current = null
   272→        setHandle((s) =>
   273→          s.visible ? { ...s, visible: false, nodeKey: null } : s,
   274→        )
   275→        return
   276→      }
   277→
   278→      const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
   279→      if (!rootElement) return
   280→
   281→      const blockRect = el.getBoundingClientRect()
   282→      const rootRect = rootElement.getBoundingClientRect()
   283→      const page = toPagePosition(blockRect)
   284→
   285→      let nodeKey: string | null = null
   286→      editor.read(() => {
   287→        const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(el)
   288→        if (node) nodeKey = node.getKey()
   289→      })
   290→
   291→      setHandle({
   292→        visible: true,
   293→        top: page.top,
   294→        left: toPagePosition(rootRect).left - HANDLE_OFFSET,
   295→        nodeKey,
   296→      })
   297→    },
   298→    [editor],
   299→  )
   300→
   301→  // ── Mousemove tracking ──
   302→  useEffect(() => {
   303→    const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
   304→    if (!rootElement) return
   305→
   306→    let rafId: number | null = null
   307→
   308→    const onMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
   309→      if (rafId !== null) return
   310→      rafId = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   311→        rafId = null
   312→        const target = e.target as HTMLElement
   313→        const block = getBlockElement(editor, target)
   314→        if (block) {
   315→          clearHideTimer()
   316→          updatePositionFromBlock(block)
   317→        }
   318→      })
   319→    }
   320→
   321→    const onMouseLeave = () => {
   322→      if (!hoveringHandleRef.current && menuOpenCountRef.current === 0) {
   323→        scheduleHide()
   324→      }
   325→    }
   326→
   327→    rootElement.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove)
   328→    rootElement.addEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseLeave)
   329→    return () => {
   330→      if (rafId !== null) cancelAnimationFrame(rafId)
   331→      rootElement.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove)
   332→      rootElement.removeEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseLeave)
   333→      clearHideTimer()
   334→    }
   335→  }, [editor, clearHideTimer, scheduleHide, updatePositionFromBlock])
   336→
   337→  // ── Scroll / resize ──
   338→  useEffect(() => {
   339→    const update = () => updatePositionFromBlock()
   340→    window.addEventListener('scroll', update, true)
   341→    window.addEventListener('resize', update)
   342→    return () => {
   343→      window.removeEventListener('scroll', update, true)
   344→      window.removeEventListener('resize', update)
   345→    }
   346→  }, [updatePositionFromBlock])
   347→
   348→  // ── Editor update listener ──
   349→  useEffect(
   350→    () => editor.registerUpdateListener(() => updatePositionFromBlock()),
   351→    [editor, updatePositionFromBlock],
   352→  )
   353→
   354→  // ── Add block handler (insert empty paragraph) ──
   355→  const handleAddBlock = useCallback(() => {
   356→    if (!handle.nodeKey) return
   357→    editor.update(() => {
   358→      const node = $getNodeByKey(handle.nodeKey!)
   359→      if (!node) return
   360→      const p = $createParagraphNode()
   361→      node.insertAfter(p)
   362→      p.selectStart()
   363→    })
   364→  }, [editor, handle.nodeKey])
   365→
   366→  // ── Turn into handler ──
   367→  const handleTurnInto = useCallback(
   368→    (type: string) => {
   369→      const { nodeKey } = handle
   370→      if (!nodeKey) return
   371→
   372→      if (['bullet', 'numbered', 'todo', 'divider'].includes(type)) {
   373→        editor.update(() => {
   374→          const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
   375→          if (!node) return
   376→          if ($isElementNode(node)) node.selectStart()
   377→        })
   378→        const commands: Record<string, any> = {
   379→          bullet: INSERT_UNORDERED_LIST_COMMAND,
   380→          numbered: INSERT_ORDERED_LIST_COMMAND,
   381→          todo: INSERT_CHECK_LIST_COMMAND,
   382→          divider: INSERT_HORIZONTAL_RULE_COMMAND,
   383→        }
   384→        editor.dispatchCommand(commands[type], void 0)
   385→        return
   386→      }
   387→
   388→      editor.update(() => {
   389→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
   390→        if (!node || !$isElementNode(node)) return
   391→        node.selectStart()
   392→        const sel = $getSelection()
   393→        if (!$isRangeSelection(sel)) return
   394→        const creators: Record<string, () => import('lexical').ElementNode> = {
   395→          paragraph: () => $createParagraphNode(),
   396→          h1: () => $createHeadingNode('h1'),
   397→          h2: () => $createHeadingNode('h2'),
   398→          h3: () => $createHeadingNode('h3'),
   399→          quote: () => $createQuoteNode(),
   400→          code: () => $createCodeNode(),
   401→        }
   402→        const create = creators[type]
   403→        if (create) $setBlocksType(sel, create)
   404→      })
   405→    },
   406→    [editor, handle.nodeKey],
   407→  )
   408→
   409→  // ── Block actions ──
   410→  const handleDelete = useCallback(() => {
   411→    if (!handle.nodeKey) return
   412→    editor.update(() => {
   413→      const node = $getNodeByKey(handle.nodeKey!)
   414→      node?.remove()
   415→    })
   416→    setHandle((s) => ({ ...s, visible: false, nodeKey: null }))
   417→  }, [editor, handle.nodeKey])
   418→
   419→  const handleDuplicate = useCallback(() => {
   420→    if (!handle.nodeKey) return
   421→    editor.update(() => {
   422→      const node = $getNodeByKey(handle.nodeKey!)
   423→      if (!node) return
   424→      const clone = $cloneNode(node)
   425→      node.insertAfter(clone)
   426→    })
   427→  }, [editor, handle.nodeKey])
   428→
   429→  const handleMoveUp = useCallback(() => {
   430→    if (!handle.nodeKey) return
   431→    editor.update(() => {
   432→      const node = $getNodeByKey(handle.nodeKey!)
   433→      if (!node) return
   434→      const prev = node.getPreviousSibling()
   435→      if (prev) {
   436→        node.remove()
   437→        prev.insertBefore(node)
   438→      }
   439→    })
   440→  }, [editor, handle.nodeKey])
   441→
   442→  const handleMoveDown = useCallback(() => {
   443→    if (!handle.nodeKey) return
   444→    editor.update(() => {
   445→      const node = $getNodeByKey(handle.nodeKey!)
   446→      if (!node) return
   447→      const next = node.getNextSibling()
   448→      if (next) {
   449→        node.remove()
   450→        next.insertAfter(node)
   451→      }
   452→    })
   453→  }, [editor, handle.nodeKey])
   454→
   455→  // ── Grip handle: controlled menu + drag ──
   456→  const [gripMenuOpen, setGripMenuOpen] = useState(false)
   457→  const dragStartedRef = useRef(false)
   458→
   459→  const clearDragVisualState = useCallback(() => {
   460→    const preview = dragPreviewRef.current
   461→    if (preview) {
   462→      preview.remove()
   463→      dragPreviewRef.current = null
   464→    }
   465→
   466→    const draggingBlock = draggingBlockRef.current
   467→    if (draggingBlock) {
   468→      draggingBlock.classList.remove(css.draggingBlock)
   469→      draggingBlockRef.current = null
   470→    }
   471→  }, [])
   472→
   473→  const onGripDragStart = useCallback(
   474→    (e: React.DragEvent) => {
   475→      dragStartedRef.current = true
   476→      if (!e.dataTransfer || !handle.nodeKey) return
   477→      e.dataTransfer.setData(DRAG_DATA_KEY, handle.nodeKey)
   478→      e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'
   479→
   480→      const block = activeBlockRef.current
   481→      if (!block) return
   482→
   483→      clearDragVisualState()
   484→
   485→      const rect = block.getBoundingClientRect()
   486→      const preview = block.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement
   487→      preview.classList.add(css.dragPreview)
   488→      preview.style.width = `${rect.width}px`
   489→      document.body.append(preview)
   490→
   491→      draggingBlockRef.current = block
   492→      dragPreviewRef.current = preview
   493→      block.classList.add(css.draggingBlock)
   494→
   495→      const offsetX = Math.max(
   496→        12,
   497→        Math.min(rect.width - 12, e.clientX - rect.left),
   498→      )
   499→      const offsetY = Math.max(
   500→        8,
   501→        Math.min(rect.height - 8, e.clientY - rect.top),
   502→      )
   503→      e.dataTransfer.setDragImage(preview, offsetX, offsetY)
   504→    },
   505→    [clearDragVisualState, handle.nodeKey],
   506→  )
   507→
   508→  const onGripOpenChange = useCallback(
   509→    (open: boolean) => {
   510→      setGripMenuOpen((prev) => {
   511→        if (prev === open) return prev
   512→        onMenuOpenChange(open)
   513→        return open
   514→      })
   515→    },
   516→    [onMenuOpenChange],
   517→  )
   518→
   519→  const onGripMouseDownCapture = useCallback((e: ReactMouseEvent) => {
   520→    dragStartedRef.current = false
   521→    // Base UI opens Menu.Trigger on mousedown; block this so drag can start first.
   522→    if (e.button === 0) e.stopPropagation()
   523→  }, [])
   524→
   525→  const onGripClick = useCallback(
   526→    (e: ReactMouseEvent) => {
   527→      // Keyboard activation is handled by Menu.Trigger itself.
   528→      if (e.detail === 0) return
   529→      e.preventDefault()
   530→      e.stopPropagation()
   531→      if (dragStartedRef.current) {
   532→        dragStartedRef.current = false
   533→        return
   534→      }
   535→      onGripOpenChange(!gripMenuOpen)
   536→    },
   537→    [gripMenuOpen, onGripOpenChange],
   538→  )
   539→
   540→  // ── Drag commands ──
   541→  useEffect(() => {
   542→    const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
   543→    if (!rootElement) return
   544→
   545→    const unregDragOver = editor.registerCommand(
   546→      DRAGOVER_COMMAND,
   547→      (event: DragEvent) => {
   548→        if (!event.dataTransfer?.types.includes(DRAG_DATA_KEY)) return false
   549→        event.preventDefault()
   550→        event.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
   551→
   552→        const block = getDropTargetBlock(editor, rootElement, event)
   553→        if (!block) {
   554→          setDropLine((s) => (s.visible ? { ...s, visible: false } : s))
   555→          return true
   556→        }
   557→
   558→        const rect = block.getBoundingClientRect()
   559→        const rootRect = rootElement.getBoundingClientRect()
   560→        const midY = rect.top + rect.height / 2
   561→        const y = event.clientY < midY ? rect.top : rect.bottom
   562→        setDropLine({
   563→          visible: true,
   564→          top: y + window.scrollY,
   565→          left: rootRect.left + window.scrollX,
   566→          width: rootRect.width,
   567→        })
   568→        return true
   569→      },
   570→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   571→    )
   572→
   573→    const unregDrop = editor.registerCommand(
   574→      DROP_COMMAND,
   575→      (event: DragEvent) => {
   576→        const draggedKey = event.dataTransfer?.getData(DRAG_DATA_KEY)
   577→        if (!draggedKey) return false
   578→        event.preventDefault()
   579→        setDropLine((s) => ({ ...s, visible: false }))
   580→        clearDragVisualState()
   581→
   582→        const block = getDropTargetBlock(editor, rootElement, event)
   583→        if (!block) return false
   584→
   585→        editor.update(() => {
   586→          const draggedNode = $getNodeByKey(draggedKey)
   587→          const targetNode = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(block)
   588→          if (!draggedNode || !targetNode || draggedNode === targetNode) return
   589→
   590→          const rect = block.getBoundingClientRect()
   591→          const midY = rect.top + rect.height / 2
   592→          draggedNode.remove()
   593→          if (event.clientY < midY) {
   594→            targetNode.insertBefore(draggedNode)
   595→          } else {
   596→            targetNode.insertAfter(draggedNode)
   597→          }
   598→        })
   599→        return true
   600→      },
   601→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   602→    )
   603→
   604→    const unregDragStart = editor.registerCommand(
   605→      DRAGSTART_COMMAND,
   606→      (event: DragEvent) => {
   607→        if (!event.dataTransfer?.types.includes(DRAG_DATA_KEY)) return false
   608→        return true
   609→      },
   610→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   611→    )
   612→
   613→    const clearDropLine = () => {
   614→      setDropLine((s) => (s.visible ? { ...s, visible: false } : s))
   615→    }
   616→    const clearDragState = () => {
   617→      clearDropLine()
   618→      clearDragVisualState()
   619→    }
   620→    const onDragLeave = (e: DragEvent) => {
   621→      if (
   622→        e.relatedTarget === null ||
   623→        !rootElement.contains(e.relatedTarget as Node)
   624→      ) {
   625→        clearDropLine()
   626→      }
   627→    }
   628→    window.addEventListener('dragend', clearDragState)
   629→    window.addEventListener('drop', clearDragState)
   630→    rootElement.addEventListener('dragleave', onDragLeave)
   631→
   632→    return () => {
   633→      unregDragOver()
   634→      unregDrop()
   635→      unregDragStart()
   636→      window.removeEventListener('dragend', clearDragState)
   637→      window.removeEventListener('drop', clearDragState)
   638→      rootElement.removeEventListener('dragleave', onDragLeave)
   639→      clearDragState()
   640→    }
   641→  }, [clearDragVisualState, editor])
   642→
   643→  // ── Render ──
   644→  return (
   645→    <>
   646→      <div
   647→        className={`${css.handleContainer} ${handle.visible ? css.handleContainerVisible : ''}`}
   648→        style={{ top: handle.top, left: handle.left }}
   649→        onMouseEnter={onHandleEnter}
   650→        onMouseLeave={onHandleLeave}
   651→      >
   652→        {/* + Add button */}
   653→        <button
   654→          className={css.handleBtn}
   655→          aria-label="Add block"
   656→          onClick={handleAddBlock}
   657→        >
   658→          <Plus size={14} />
   659→        </button>
   660→
   661→        {/* Grip handle */}
   662→        <DropdownMenu open={gripMenuOpen} onOpenChange={onGripOpenChange}>
   663→          <DropdownMenuTrigger
   664→            className={css.handleBtn}
   665→            aria-label="Block actions"
   666→            draggable
   667→            onDragStart={onGripDragStart as any}
   668→            onMouseDownCapture={onGripMouseDownCapture}
   669→            onClick={onGripClick}
   670→          >
   671→            <GripVertical size={14} />
   672→          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
   673→          <DropdownMenuContent side="bottom" align="start" sideOffset={4}>
   674→            <DropdownMenuGroup>
   675→              <DropdownMenuLabel>TURN INTO</DropdownMenuLabel>
   676→              {TURN_INTO_ITEMS.map((item) => (
   677→                <DropdownMenuItem
   678→                  key={item.key}
   679→                  onClick={() => handleTurnInto(item.key)}
   680→                >
   681→                  <item.icon size={14} />
   682→                  {item.label}
   683→                </DropdownMenuItem>
   684→              ))}
   685→            </DropdownMenuGroup>
   686→            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   687→            <DropdownMenuGroup>
   688→              <DropdownMenuLabel>ACTIONS</DropdownMenuLabel>
   689→              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleDuplicate}>
   690→                <Copy size={14} />
   691→                Duplicate
   692→              </DropdownMenuItem>
   693→              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleMoveUp}>
   694→                <ArrowUp size={14} />
   695→                Move Up
   696→              </DropdownMenuItem>
   697→              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleMoveDown}>
   698→                <ArrowDown size={14} />
   699→                Move Down
   700→              </DropdownMenuItem>
   701→            </DropdownMenuGroup>
   702→            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   703→            <DropdownMenuItem
   704→              className={css.menuItemDestructive}
   705→              onClick={handleDelete}
   706→            >
   707→              <Trash2 size={14} />
   708→              Delete
   709→            </DropdownMenuItem>
   710→          </DropdownMenuContent>
   711→        </DropdownMenu>
   712→      </div>
   713→
   714→      {/* Drop indicator */}
   715→      {dropLine.visible && (
   716→        <div
   717→          className={css.dropIndicator}
   718→          style={{
   719→            top: dropLine.top,
   720→            left: dropLine.left,
   721→            width: dropLine.width,
   722→          }}
   723→        />
   724→      )}
   725→    </>
   726→  )
   727→}
   728→
   729→// ─── Export ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   730→export function BlockHandlePlugin(): ReactElement {
   731→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   732→  return createPortal(<BlockHandleInner editor={editor} />, document.body)
   733→}
   734→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { vars } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→import { keyframes, style } from '@vanilla-extract/css'
     3→
     4→/** Vercel-inspired line tooltip: thin border, minimal shadow, clean typography */
     5→const tooltipIn = keyframes({
     6→  from: { opacity: 0, transform: 'translateY(2px)' },
     7→  to: { opacity: 1, transform: 'translateY(0)' },
     8→})
     9→
    10→const tooltipOut = keyframes({
    11→  from: { opacity: 1, transform: 'translateY(0)' },
    12→  to: { opacity: 0, transform: 'translateY(2px)' },
    13→})
    14→
    15→export const popup = style({
    16→  zIndex: 50,
    17→  maxWidth: 320,
    18→  padding: '6px 10px',
    19→  fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeMd,
    20→  lineHeight: 1.4,
    21→  color: vars.color.text,
    22→  backgroundColor: vars.color.bg,
    23→  border: `1px solid ${vars.color.border}`,
    24→  borderRadius: vars.borderRadius.md,
    25→  boxShadow: vars.boxShadow.menu,
    26→  outline: 'none',
    27→  whiteSpace: 'normal',
    28→  wordBreak: 'break-word',
    29→  pointerEvents: 'none',
    30→  transition: 'opacity 120ms ease-out, transform 120ms ease-out',
    31→  selectors: {
    32→    '&[data-open]': {
    33→      animation: `${tooltipIn} 120ms ease-out`,
    34→    },
    35→    '&[data-ending-style]': {
    36→      opacity: 0,
    37→      transform: 'translateY(2px)',
    38→    },
    39→    '&[data-closed]': {
    40→      animation: `${tooltipOut} 120ms ease-in`,
    41→    },
    42→  },
    43→})
    44→
```

 `./haklex/rich-editor-ui/src/components/tooltip/index.tsx`

```text
     1→import { Tooltip as TooltipPrimitive } from '@base-ui/react/tooltip'
     2→import { PortalThemeWrapper } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     3→import type { ComponentProps, ReactNode } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import * as css from './styles.css'
     6→
     7→// -- Provider (shared delay for multiple tooltips) --
     8→
     9→type TooltipProviderProps = ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Provider>
    10→
    11→export function TooltipProvider(props: TooltipProviderProps) {
    12→  return <TooltipPrimitive.Provider {...props} />
    13→}
    14→
    15→// -- Root --
    16→
    17→type TooltipRootProps = ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Root>
    18→
    19→export function TooltipRoot(props: TooltipRootProps) {
    20→  return <TooltipPrimitive.Root {...props} />
    21→}
    22→
    23→// -- Trigger --
    24→
    25→type TooltipTriggerProps = ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Trigger>
    26→
    27→export function TooltipTrigger(props: TooltipTriggerProps) {
    28→  return <TooltipPrimitive.Trigger {...props} />
    29→}
    30→
    31→// -- Portal --
    32→
    33→type TooltipPortalProps = ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Portal>
    34→
    35→export function TooltipPortal({ children, ...props }: TooltipPortalProps) {
    36→  return (
    37→    <TooltipPrimitive.Portal {...props}>
    38→      <PortalThemeWrapper>{children}</PortalThemeWrapper>
    39→    </TooltipPrimitive.Portal>
    40→  )
    41→}
    42→
    43→// -- Positioner --
    44→
    45→type TooltipPositionerProps = ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Positioner>
    46→
    47→export function TooltipPositioner(props: TooltipPositionerProps) {
    48→  return <TooltipPrimitive.Positioner {...props} />
    49→}
    50→
    51→// -- Popup --
    52→
    53→type TooltipPopupProps = Omit<
    54→  ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Popup>,
    55→  'render'
    56→> & {
    57→  className?: string
    58→  children?: ReactNode
    59→}
    60→
    61→export function TooltipPopup({
    62→  className,
    63→  children,
    64→  ...props
    65→}: TooltipPopupProps) {
    66→  return (
    67→    <TooltipPrimitive.Popup
    68→      className={`${css.popup}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
    69→      {...props}
    70→    >
    71→      {children}
    72→    </TooltipPrimitive.Popup>
    73→  )
    74→}
    75→
    76→// -- Content (Positioner + Popup convenience) --
    77→
    78→type TooltipContentProps = TooltipPopupProps & {
    79→  side?: TooltipPositionerProps['side']
    80→  sideOffset?: TooltipPositionerProps['sideOffset']
    81→  align?: TooltipPositionerProps['align']
    82→}
    83→
    84→export function TooltipContent({
    85→  side = 'top',
    86→  sideOffset = 6,
    87→  align = 'center',
    88→  className,
    89→  children,
    90→  ...popupProps
    91→}: TooltipContentProps) {
    92→  return (
    93→    <TooltipPortal>
    94→      <TooltipPositioner side={side} sideOffset={sideOffset} align={align}>
    95→        <TooltipPopup className={className} {...popupProps}>
    96→          {children}
    97→        </TooltipPopup>
    98→      </TooltipPositioner>
    99→    </TooltipPortal>
   100→  )
   101→}
   102→
   103→// -- Shared handle (single tooltip instance across multiple triggers) --
   104→
   105→export const createTooltipHandle: typeof TooltipPrimitive.createHandle =
   106→  TooltipPrimitive.createHandle
   107→
   108→export type {
   109→  TooltipContentProps,
   110→  TooltipPopupProps,
   111→  TooltipPortalProps,
   112→  TooltipPositionerProps,
   113→  TooltipProviderProps,
   114→  TooltipRootProps,
   115→  TooltipTriggerProps,
   116→}
   117→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     9→  TooltipContent,
    10→  TooltipProvider,

    13→} from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'

    18→  INSERT_UNORDERED_LIST_COMMAND,
    19→} from '@lexical/list'
    20→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
    21→import { $createHeadingNode, $isHeadingNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
    22→import {
    23→  $getSelectionStyleValueForProperty,
    24→  $patchStyleText,
    25→  $setBlocksType,
    26→} from '@lexical/selection'
    27→import { $findMatchingParent } from '@lexical/utils'
    28→import type { ElementFormatType, ElementNode } from 'lexical'
    29→import {
    30→  $createParagraphNode,
    31→  $getSelection,
    32→  $isElementNode,
    33→  $isRangeSelection,
    34→  $isRootOrShadowRoot,
    35→  CAN_REDO_COMMAND,
    36→  CAN_UNDO_COMMAND,
    37→  COMMAND_PRIORITY_LOW,
    38→  FORMAT_ELEMENT_COMMAND,
    39→  FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND,
    40→  REDO_COMMAND,
    41→  UNDO_COMMAND,
    42→} from 'lexical'
    43→import {
    44→  AlignCenter,
    45→  AlignJustify,
    46→  AlignLeft,
    47→  AlignRight,
    48→  Bold,
    49→  Code,
    50→  Ellipsis,
    51→  Heading1,
    52→  Heading2,
    53→  Heading3,
    54→  Highlighter,
    55→  Italic,
    56→  List,
    57→  ListChecks,
    58→  ListOrdered,
    59→  Pilcrow,
    60→  Redo,
    61→  Strikethrough,
    62→  Underline,
    63→  Undo,
    64→} from 'lucide-react'
    65→import type { CSSProperties, ReactElement } from 'react'
    66→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
    67→
    68→import * as css from './styles.css'
    69→import { ToolbarButton } from './ToolbarButton'
    70→import { ToolbarDropdown } from './ToolbarDropdown'
    71→import { ToolbarSeparator } from './ToolbarSeparator'
    72→import type { ToolbarTooltipPayload } from './types'
    73→
    74→const ICON_SIZE = 15
    75→const ICON_STROKE = 2
    76→
    77→// ─── Font Family ────────────────────────────────────────
    78→
    79→interface FontFamilyDef {
    80→  label: string
    81→  value: string
    82→}
    83→
    84→const FONT_FAMILIES: FontFamilyDef[] = [
    85→  { label: '默认', value: '' },
    86→  {
    87→    label: '宋体',
    88→    value: '"Noto Serif CJK SC", "Source Han Serif SC", SimSun, serif',
    89→  },
    90→  {
    91→    label: '黑体',
    92→    value: '"Noto Sans CJK SC", "Source Han Sans SC", SimHei, sans-serif',
    93→  },
    94→  { label: '楷体', value: 'KaiTi, STKaiti, serif' },
    95→  { label: 'Sans', value: 'system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif' },
    96→  { label: 'Serif', value: 'Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif' },
    97→  { label: 'Mono', value: 'ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "Fira Code", monospace' },
    98→]
    99→
   100→function getFontLabel(fontFamily: string): string {
   101→  if (!fontFamily) return '默认'
   102→  const match = FONT_FAMILIES.find((f) => f.value === fontFamily)
   103→  if (match) return match.label
   104→  for (const def of FONT_FAMILIES) {
   105→    if (def.value && fontFamily.startsWith(def.value.split(',')[0]!)) {
   106→      return def.label
   107→    }
   108→  }
   109→  return '默认'
   110→}
   111→
   112→// ─── Block Type ─────────────────────────────────────────
   113→
   114→type BlockType =
   115→  | 'paragraph'
   116→  | 'h1'
   117→  | 'h2'
   118→  | 'h3'
   119→  | 'bullet'
   120→  | 'number'
   121→  | 'check'
   122→  | 'other'
   123→
   124→const BLOCK_TYPE_LABELS: Record<BlockType, string> = {
   125→  paragraph: 'Text',
   126→  h1: 'Heading 1',
   127→  h2: 'Heading 2',
   128→  h3: 'Heading 3',
   129→  bullet: 'Bulleted List',
   130→  number: 'Numbered List',
   131→  check: 'To-do List',
   132→  other: 'Other',
   133→}
   134→
   135→// ─── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   136→
   137→interface ToolbarState {
   138→  canUndo: boolean
   139→  canRedo: boolean
   140→  blockType: BlockType
   141→  fontFamily: string
   142→  elementFormat: ElementFormatType
   143→  isBold: boolean
   144→  isItalic: boolean
   145→  isUnderline: boolean
   146→  isStrikethrough: boolean
   147→  isCode: boolean
   148→  isHighlight: boolean
   149→}
   150→
   151→const INITIAL_STATE: ToolbarState = {
   152→  canUndo: false,
   153→  canRedo: false,
   154→  blockType: 'paragraph',
   155→  fontFamily: '',
   156→  elementFormat: 'left',
   157→  isBold: false,
   158→  isItalic: false,
   159→  isUnderline: false,
   160→  isStrikethrough: false,
   161→  isCode: false,
   162→  isHighlight: false,
   163→}
   164→
   165→function getBlockType(anchorNode: ElementNode): BlockType {
   166→  if ($isHeadingNode(anchorNode)) {
   167→    const tag = anchorNode.getTag()
   168→    if (tag === 'h1' || tag === 'h2' || tag === 'h3') return tag
   169→    return 'other'
   170→  }
   171→  if ($isListNode(anchorNode)) {
   172→    const listType = anchorNode.getListType()
   173→    if (listType === 'bullet') return 'bullet'
   174→    if (listType === 'number') return 'number'
   175→    if (listType === 'check') return 'check'
   176→    return 'other'
   177→  }
   178→  const type = anchorNode.getType()
   179→  if (type === 'paragraph') return 'paragraph'
   180→  return 'other'
   181→}
   182→
   183→// ─── Component ──────────────────────────────────────────
   184→
   185→const DEFAULT_MAX_VISIBLE_INSERT_ITEMS = 5
   186→
   187→export interface ToolbarPluginProps {
   188→  className?: string
   189→  maxVisibleInsertItems?: number
   190→  insertItemOrder?: string[]
   191→}
   192→
   193→export function ToolbarPlugin({
   194→  className,
   195→  maxVisibleInsertItems = DEFAULT_MAX_VISIBLE_INSERT_ITEMS,
   196→  insertItemOrder,
   197→}: ToolbarPluginProps): ReactElement {
   198→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   199→  const [state, setState] = useState<ToolbarState>(INITIAL_STATE)
   200→  const [tooltipHandle] = useState(() =>
   201→    createTooltipHandle<ToolbarTooltipPayload>(),
   202→  )
   203→
   204→  const toolbarItems = useMemo(() => {
   205→    const items = collectCommandItems(editor).filter(
   206→      (item) => item.placement?.includes('toolbar') && item.group === 'insert',
   207→    )
   208→    if (!insertItemOrder || insertItemOrder.length === 0) return items
   209→    return items.sort((a, b) => {
   210→      const ai = insertItemOrder.indexOf(a.title)
   211→      const bi = insertItemOrder.indexOf(b.title)
   212→      return (ai === -1 ? Infinity : ai) - (bi === -1 ? Infinity : bi)
   213→    })
   214→  }, [editor, insertItemOrder])
   215→
   216→  const updateToolbar = useCallback(() => {
   217→    const selection = $getSelection()
   218→    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) return
   219→
   220→    const anchorNode = selection.anchor.getNode()
   221→    let element =
   222→      anchorNode.getKey() === 'root'
   223→        ? anchorNode
   224→        : ($findMatchingParent(anchorNode, (e) => {
   225→            const parent = e.getParent()
   226→            return parent !== null && $isRootOrShadowRoot(parent)
   227→          }) ?? anchorNode.getTopLevelElementOrThrow())
   228→
   229→    if ($isListNode(element)) {
   230→      const parentList = $findMatchingParent(anchorNode, (node) =>
   231→        $isListNode(node),
   232→      )
   233→      if (parentList) {
   234→        element = parentList
   235→      }
   236→    }
   237→
   238→    const blockType = getBlockType(element as ElementNode)
   239→    const fontFamily = $getSelectionStyleValueForProperty(
   240→      selection,
   241→      'font-family',
   242→      '',
   243→    )
   244→    const elementFormat: ElementFormatType = $isElementNode(element)
   245→      ? element.getFormatType()
   246→      : 'left'
   247→
   248→    setState((prev) => ({
   249→      ...prev,
   250→      blockType,
   251→      fontFamily,
   252→      elementFormat,
   253→      isBold: selection.hasFormat('bold'),
   254→      isItalic: selection.hasFormat('italic'),
   255→      isUnderline: selection.hasFormat('underline'),
   256→      isStrikethrough: selection.hasFormat('strikethrough'),
   257→      isCode: selection.hasFormat('code'),
   258→      isHighlight: selection.hasFormat('highlight'),
   259→    }))
   260→  }, [])
   261→
   262→  useEffect(() => {
   263→    const unregisterUndo = editor.registerCommand(
   264→      CAN_UNDO_COMMAND,
   265→      (payload) => {
   266→        setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, canUndo: payload }))
   267→        return false
   268→      },
   269→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_LOW,
   270→    )
   271→    const unregisterRedo = editor.registerCommand(
   272→      CAN_REDO_COMMAND,
   273→      (payload) => {
   274→        setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, canRedo: payload }))
   275→        return false
   276→      },
   277→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_LOW,
   278→    )
   279→    const unregisterUpdate = editor.registerUpdateListener(
   280→      ({ editorState }) => {
   281→        editorState.read(() => {
   282→          updateToolbar()
   283→        })
   284→      },
   285→    )
   286→    return () => {
   287→      unregisterUndo()
   288→      unregisterRedo()
   289→      unregisterUpdate()
   290→    }
   291→  }, [editor, updateToolbar])
   292→
   293→  const applyFontFamily = useCallback(
   294→    (value: string) => {
   295→      editor.update(() => {
   296→        const selection = $getSelection()
   297→        if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   298→          $patchStyleText(selection, { 'font-family': value || '' })
   299→        }
   300→      })
   301→    },
   302→    [editor],
   303→  )
   304→
   305→  const fontFamilyItems = useMemo(
   306→    () =>
   307→      FONT_FAMILIES.map((def) => ({
   308→        label: def.label,
   309→        active: state.fontFamily === def.value,
   310→        style: def.value
   311→          ? ({ fontFamily: def.value } as CSSProperties)
   312→          : undefined,
   313→        onSelect: () => applyFontFamily(def.value),
   314→      })),
   315→    [state.fontFamily, applyFontFamily],
   316→  )
   317→
   318→  const headingItems = useMemo(
   319→    () => [
   320→      {
   321→        label: 'Text',
   322→        icon: <Pilcrow size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />,
   323→        active: state.blockType === 'paragraph',
   324→        onSelect: () => {
   325→          editor.update(() => {
   326→            const selection = $getSelection()
   327→            if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   328→              $setBlocksType(selection, () => $createParagraphNode())
   329→            }
   330→          })
   331→        },
   332→      },
   333→      {
   334→        label: 'Heading 1',
   335→        icon: <Heading1 size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />,
   336→        active: state.blockType === 'h1',
   337→        onSelect: () => {
   338→          editor.update(() => {
   339→            const selection = $getSelection()
   340→            if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   341→              $setBlocksType(selection, () => $createHeadingNode('h1'))
   342→            }
   343→          })
   344→        },
   345→      },
   346→      {
   347→        label: 'Heading 2',
   348→        icon: <Heading2 size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />,
   349→        active: state.blockType === 'h2',
   350→        onSelect: () => {
   351→          editor.update(() => {
   352→            const selection = $getSelection()
   353→            if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   354→              $setBlocksType(selection, () => $createHeadingNode('h2'))
   355→            }
   356→          })
   357→        },
   358→      },
   359→      {
   360→        label: 'Heading 3',
   361→        icon: <Heading3 size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />,
   362→        active: state.blockType === 'h3',
   363→        onSelect: () => {
   364→          editor.update(() => {
   365→            const selection = $getSelection()
   366→            if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   367→              $setBlocksType(selection, () => $createHeadingNode('h3'))
   368→            }
   369→          })
   370→        },
   371→      },
   372→    ],
   373→    [editor, state.blockType],
   374→  )
   375→
   376→  const containerClassName = className
   377→    ? `${css.toolbarContainer} ${className}`
   378→    : css.toolbarContainer
   379→
   380→  const h = tooltipHandle
   381→
   382→  return (
   383→    <TooltipProvider delay={300}>
   384→      <TooltipRoot
   385→        handle={tooltipHandle as TooltipRootProps['handle']}
   386→        disableHoverablePopup
   387→      >
   388→        {
   389→          ((props: { payload?: ToolbarTooltipPayload }) =>
   390→            props.payload !== undefined ? (
   391→              <TooltipContent side="bottom" sideOffset={4}>
   392→                {props.payload.title}
   393→                {props.payload.shortcut && (
   394→                  <span className={css.tooltipShortcut}>
   395→                    {props.payload.shortcut}
   396→                  </span>
   397→                )}
   398→              </TooltipContent>
   399→            ) : null) as TooltipRootProps['children']
   400→        }
   401→      </TooltipRoot>
   402→
   403→      <div
   404→        className={containerClassName}
   405→        role="toolbar"
   406→        aria-label="Editor toolbar"
   407→      >
   408→        <div className={css.toolbarRow}>
   409→          {/* Font Family */}
   410→          <ToolbarDropdown
   411→            label={getFontLabel(state.fontFamily)}
   412→            title="Font family"
   413→            items={fontFamilyItems}
   414→            triggerWidth={76}
   415→            tooltipHandle={h}
   416→          />
   417→
   418→          <ToolbarSeparator />
   419→
   420→          {/* Heading dropdown */}
   421→          <ToolbarDropdown
   422→            label={BLOCK_TYPE_LABELS[state.blockType] ?? 'Text'}
   423→            title="Block type"
   424→            items={headingItems}
   425→            triggerWidth={120}
   426→            tooltipHandle={h}
   427→          />
   428→
   429→          <ToolbarSeparator />
   430→
   431→          {/* Undo / Redo */}
   432→          <ToolbarButton
   433→            icon={<Undo size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   434→            title="Undo"
   435→            shortcut="Ctrl+Z"
   436→            disabled={!state.canUndo}
   437→            onClick={() => editor.dispatchCommand(UNDO_COMMAND, undefined)}
   438→            tooltipHandle={h}
   439→          />
   440→          <ToolbarButton
   441→            icon={<Redo size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   442→            title="Redo"
   443→            shortcut="Ctrl+Y"
   444→            disabled={!state.canRedo}
   445→            onClick={() => editor.dispatchCommand(REDO_COMMAND, undefined)}
   446→            tooltipHandle={h}
   447→          />
   448→
   449→          <ToolbarSeparator />
   450→
   451→          {/* Format buttons */}
   452→          <ToolbarButton
   453→            icon={<Bold size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   454→            title="Bold"
   455→            shortcut="Ctrl+B"
   456→            active={state.isBold}
   457→            onClick={() => editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND, 'bold')}
   458→            tooltipHandle={h}
   459→          />
   460→          <ToolbarButton
   461→            icon={<Italic size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   462→            title="Italic"
   463→            shortcut="Ctrl+I"
   464→            active={state.isItalic}
   465→            onClick={() =>
   466→              editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND, 'italic')
   467→            }
   468→            tooltipHandle={h}
   469→          />
   470→          <ToolbarButton
   471→            icon={<Underline size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   472→            title="Underline"
   473→            shortcut="Ctrl+U"
   474→            active={state.isUnderline}
   475→            onClick={() =>
   476→              editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND, 'underline')
   477→            }
   478→            tooltipHandle={h}
   479→          />
   480→          <ToolbarButton
   481→            icon={<Strikethrough size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   482→            title="Strikethrough"
   483→            active={state.isStrikethrough}
   484→            onClick={() =>
   485→              editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND, 'strikethrough')
   486→            }
   487→            tooltipHandle={h}
   488→          />
   489→          <ToolbarButton
   490→            icon={<Code size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   491→            title="Inline Code"
   492→            active={state.isCode}
   493→            onClick={() => editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND, 'code')}
   494→            tooltipHandle={h}
   495→          />
   496→
   497→          <ToolbarSeparator />
   498→
   499→          {/* Highlight */}
   500→          <ToolbarButton
   501→            icon={<Highlighter size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   502→            title="Highlight"
   503→            active={state.isHighlight}
   504→            onClick={() =>
   505→              editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND, 'highlight')
   506→            }
   507→            tooltipHandle={h}
   508→          />
   509→
   510→          <ToolbarSeparator />
   511→
   512→          {/* List buttons */}
   513→          <ToolbarButton
   514→            icon={<List size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   515→            title="Bulleted List"
   516→            active={state.blockType === 'bullet'}
   517→            onClick={() =>
   518→              editor.dispatchCommand(INSERT_UNORDERED_LIST_COMMAND, undefined)
   519→            }
   520→            tooltipHandle={h}
   521→          />
   522→          <ToolbarButton
   523→            icon={<ListOrdered size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   524→            title="Numbered List"
   525→            active={state.blockType === 'number'}
   526→            onClick={() =>
   527→              editor.dispatchCommand(INSERT_ORDERED_LIST_COMMAND, undefined)
   528→            }
   529→            tooltipHandle={h}
   530→          />
   531→          <ToolbarButton
   532→            icon={<ListChecks size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   533→            title="Checklist"
   534→            active={state.blockType === 'check'}
   535→            onClick={() =>
   536→              editor.dispatchCommand(INSERT_CHECK_LIST_COMMAND, undefined)
   537→            }
   538→            tooltipHandle={h}
   539→          />
   540→
   541→          <ToolbarSeparator />
   542→
   543→          {/* Alignment */}
   544→          <ToolbarButton
   545→            icon={<AlignLeft size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   546→            title="Align Left"
   547→            active={
   548→              state.elementFormat === 'left' || state.elementFormat === ''
   549→            }
   550→            onClick={() =>
   551→              editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_ELEMENT_COMMAND, 'left')
   552→            }
   553→            tooltipHandle={h}
   554→          />
   555→          <ToolbarButton
   556→            icon={<AlignCenter size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   557→            title="Align Center"
   558→            active={state.elementFormat === 'center'}
   559→            onClick={() =>
   560→              editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_ELEMENT_COMMAND, 'center')
   561→            }
   562→            tooltipHandle={h}
   563→          />
   564→          <ToolbarButton
   565→            icon={<AlignRight size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   566→            title="Align Right"
   567→            active={state.elementFormat === 'right'}
   568→            onClick={() =>
   569→              editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_ELEMENT_COMMAND, 'right')
   570→            }
   571→            tooltipHandle={h}

   573→          <ToolbarButton
   574→            icon={<AlignJustify size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />}
   575→            title="Justify"
   576→            active={state.elementFormat === 'justify'}
   577→            onClick={() =>
   578→              editor.dispatchCommand(FORMAT_ELEMENT_COMMAND, 'justify')
   579→            }
   580→            tooltipHandle={h}
   581→          />
   582→
   583→          {/* Dynamic insert items */}
   584→          {toolbarItems.length > 0 && (
   585→            <>
   586→              <ToolbarSeparator />
   587→              {toolbarItems.slice(0, maxVisibleInsertItems).map((item) => (
   588→                <ToolbarButton
   589→                  key={item.title}
   590→                  icon={item.icon}
   591→                  title={item.title}
   592→                  shortcut={item.shortcut}
   593→                  onClick={() => item.onSelect(editor, '')}
   594→                  tooltipHandle={h}
   595→                />
   596→              ))}
   597→              {toolbarItems.length > maxVisibleInsertItems && (
   598→                <DropdownMenu modal={false}>
   599→                  <TooltipTrigger
   600→                    handle={h}
   601→                    payload={{ title: 'More' } satisfies ToolbarTooltipPayload}
   602→                    render={
   603→                      <DropdownMenuTrigger
   604→                        className={css.toolbarButton}
   605→                        render={<button type="button" />}
   606→                      />
   607→                    }
   608→                  >
   609→                    <Ellipsis size={ICON_SIZE} strokeWidth={ICON_STROKE} />
   610→                  </TooltipTrigger>
   611→                  <DropdownMenuContent positionMethod="fixed" sideOffset={4}>
   612→                    {toolbarItems.slice(maxVisibleInsertItems).map((item) => (
   613→                      <DropdownMenuItem
   614→                        key={item.title}
   615→                        onClick={() => item.onSelect(editor, '')}
   616→                      >
   617→                        {item.icon && (
   618→                          <span
   619→                            style={{
   620→                              marginRight: 8,
   621→                              display: 'inline-flex',
   622→                              transform: 'scale(0.8)',
   623→                              transformOrigin: 'left center',
   624→                            }}
   625→                          >
   626→                            {item.icon}
   627→                          </span>
   628→                        )}
   629→                        {item.title}
   630→                      </DropdownMenuItem>
   631→                    ))}
   632→                  </DropdownMenuContent>
   633→                </DropdownMenu>
   634→              )}
   635→            </>
   636→          )}
   637→        </div>
   638→      </div>
   639→    </TooltipProvider>
   640→  )
   641→}
   642→
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I understand the issues:

1. **Dropdown menu text size** - Currently `vars.typography.fontSizeSm` (0.8125em ≈ 13px) which is a bit small. Need to bump it up slightly. Looking at the token values:
   - `fontSizeSmall`: 14px (absolute)
   - `fontSizeSm`: 0.8125em (relative ≈ 13px)
   - `fontSizeMd`: 0.875em (relative ≈ 14px)
   
   The user changed it from `fontSizeSmall` to `fontSizeSm` in their manual edit. 

I should switch back to `fontSizeSmall` or use `fontSizeMd` instead, since both are more readable than the current size.

2. **Tooltip text size** - Currently `vars.typography.fontSizeMd` (0.875em ≈ 14px), which is too large for a tooltip. I need something smaller like `fontSizeXs` (0.75em ≈ 12px), which is the standard tooltip size.

3. **Tooltip** - (continuing from the cut-off thought)

The z-index setup seems problematic. The toolbar is `zIndex: 2` with `position: sticky`, while the tooltip popup has `zIndex: 50` and renders through a Portal. The issue is that the `TooltipPositioner` itself doesn't have a z-index set, only the inner `popup` style does, so the positioning context might not be working as expected. The dropdown menu's positioner has `zIndex: 50` with `isolation: 'isolate'`, but the tooltip's positioner is missing a z-index entirely—that's probably the root cause. I need to either add z-index to the tooltip positioner or move it from the popup element up to the positioner level. The toolbar's `position: sticky; zIndex: 2` creates its own stacking context, but since the tooltip renders through a Portal to the document body, it should sit outside that context anyway.

Looking at the screenshot, the tooltip actually appears above the toolbar fine, so the issue might be when the toolbar dropdown opens or during scrolling. The real problem is likely that the tooltip's positioner uses `position: fixed` or `position: absolute` without its own z-index, which means the child popup's `zIndex: 50` won't help—I need to apply the z-index to the positioner itself.

The fix is straightforward: I'll add the z-index styling directly to the `TooltipPositioner` in the `TooltipContent` component, similar to how the dropdown menu handles it.

Now I'm mapping out the three key changes needed: adjusting the dropdown menu item font size to be slightly larger, reducing the tooltip font size to be smaller, and adding the z-index property to ensure the tooltip layers correctly.
</details></think>
